chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. S- 442 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.6.2014 Syed Shahzad Ali Shah advocate for petitioner Mr. Mukhtiar Ahmed Khanzada, State Counsel Learned counsel for petitioner submits that he would be satisfied in case the directions are issued to the official respondents not to cause harassment to the petitioner. Learned State Counsel present in court states that in fact no harassment has been caused to the petitioner by the official respondents nor they intend to extend / cause harassment to him. That statement has satisfied the counsel for petitioner who does not press this petition which is accordingly disposed of as such with directions to the official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioner at the time of need. JUDGE k/-
